That rate will be cut in half, dropping from 3.2 million WLD per day to 1.6 million.Apr 11, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://beincrypto.com/worldcoin-wld-token-unlock-rate-drops/#:~:text=Worldcoin%20(WLD)%20Token%20Unlock%20Rate,per%20day%20to%201.6%20million.","title":"Worldcoin Slashes Token Unlocks by Nearly Half, Will It Impact Price?","content":"World, a cryptocurrency project founded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, announced a significant reduction to the Worldcoin (WLD) daily token unlock rate starting July 24.
According to the announcement, the daily unlock rate will fall by 43% on July 24.
The largest reduction affects the World Community allocation.
That rate will be cut in half, dropping from 3.2 million WLD per day to 1.6 million.
In total, daily emissions will fall from roughly 5.1 million WLD to 2.9 million.
The announcement arrives weeks after the World Foundation completed a $65 million over-the-counter token sale at roughly $0.27 per WLD.
WLD has lost over 45% of its value since the start of 2026 and trades roughly 97% below its March 2024 peak near $11."},{"url":"https://www.techi.com/worldcoin-wld-unlock-rate-43-percent-july-2026/","title":"Worldcoin WLD Unlock Cut: What Changes July 24 | TECHi","content":"6 days ago — new WLD tokens reach the market on July 24, cutting the daily unlock by 43% — from about 5.1 million tokens a day to roughly 2.9 million. ...
At about $0.41, the cut removes roughly $0.9 million a day of potential new supply — under 1% of WLD's ~$190 million daily trading volume.
About 3.53 billion of a fixed 10 billion WLD is circulating; the remaining ~6.5 billion (~$2.6 billion) still unlocks over years.
On paper that is a supply-side gift to a token trading near $0.41, more than 96% below its March 2024 peak of $11.80.
At the current price, the reduction pulls under $1 million a day of potential new supply out of a token that changes hands to the tune of roughly $190 million every 24 hours.
Scheduled daily WLD unlock rates, effective July 24, 2026: Community allocation: 3.2M WLD/day before the scheduled change to 1.6M WLD/day from July 24 (−50%).
After July 24, 2.9 million tokens is about $1.2 million.

In a blog post on its official site, the project said that from July 24, 2026, the aggregate unlock rate will fall from roughly 5.1 million WLD per day to about 2.9 million, as on‑chain contracts automatically adjust the flow of new tokens to the community, team and early investors. The unlock rate for the “World community” allocation, which covers tokens distributed to users and operators, will be cut from 3.2 million WLD per day to 1.6 million, a 50% reduction. In aggregate, daily unlocks drop from about 5.1 million WLD to roughly 2.9 million WLD, a change the team says is intended “to gradually reduce selling pressure” as more of the supply becomes liquid.","score":0.9231018,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/crypto/articles/worldcoin-slashes-token-unlocks-nearly-070000942.html","title":"Worldcoin Slashes Token Unlocks by Nearly Half, Will It ...","content":"2.
